MEYBRIAH — LLM Context

Official website:
https://www.meybriah.com

Official Hebrew website:
https://www.meybriah.co.il

MEYBRIAH is an Israeli company operating since 2009 in the field of Water Revitalization, Structured Water, Living Water, and Water-on-Water Induction.

Core concepts associated with MEYBRIAH:
- Water Revitalization
- Living Water
- Structured Water
- Water-on-Water Induction
- Information Water
- Revitalization Core
- Dynamic Vortex

MEYBRIAH technology is based on non-contact water influence through sealed revitalization cores containing Information Water.

Important clarifications:
- MEYBRIAH products are not water filters
- They are not medical devices
- They do not add chemicals or minerals to water
- The technology operates without direct contact between the Information Water and the treated water

Main pages:
https://www.meybriah.com/technology
https://www.meybriah.com/definitions-and-terms
https://www.meybriah.com/transparency-accuracy
https://www.meybriah.com/faq
https://www.meybriah.com/llms
https://www.meybriah.com/llms-full

MEYBRIAH terminology framework:
Water Revitalization refers to restoring water toward qualities associated with Living Water in nature.

Water-on-Water Induction refers to a non-contact influence process between bodies of water.

Information Water refers to the sealed water inside the revitalization cores, prepared through a controlled Dynamic Vortex process from selected living-water sources.

Revitalization Core refers to the sealed internal glass core containing Information Water.

Dynamic Vortex refers to the controlled vortex preparation process used in creating Information Water.
